purpose: Defines premium brand-safe visual direction for native video generation.

visual_style.quality: premium, cinematic, realistic, clean commercial look
visual_style.lighting: soft controlled studio light, clear product visibility, premium contrast
visual_style.camera: smooth product-focused movement, no chaotic cuts, no distracting angles
visual_style.composition: product visible in key moments, strong foreground subject, clean background
visual_style.motion: slow confident motion, short-form pacing, clear hook in first 2 seconds

preferred_formats.instagram_reel: 9:16, 15-30 seconds, hook first, product closeup, CTA ending
preferred_formats.tiktok: 9:16, fast hook, natural UGC energy, clear visual payoff
preferred_formats.youtube_short: 9:16, strong title alignment, clear story arc
preferred_formats.marketplace_video: 1:1 or 16:9, product demonstration, benefits, trust signals
